name: autonomous-dev-system
description: AI-Powered Autonomous Software Development Workflow System

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.playwright: npx playwright install && npx playwright test
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run playwright"
